ddls:
CREATE TABLE "size_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the size category (e.g., Men, Women, Kids) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the size category */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Country code for the size category */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group for the size category (e.g., Men, Women, Kids) */,
  "size_system" TEXT /* Sizing system (e.g., US, UK, EU) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_ranges" (
  "range_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size range entry */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size category */,
  "size_label" TEXT /* General label for the size (e.g., XS, S) */,
  "size_xs" TEXT /* Size range for XS */,
  "size_s" TEXT /* Size range for S */,
  "size_ml" TEXT /* Size range for M/L */,
  "size_xl" TEXT /* Size range for XL */,
  "size_us" TEXT /* US size equivalent */,
  "size_uk" TEXT /* UK size equivalent */,
  "size_eu" TEXT /* EU size equivalent */,
  "size_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the size */,
  "size_guidelines" TEXT /* Guidelines for fitting the size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("range_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_ranges_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES size_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_mappings" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size mapping */,
  "from_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the source size category */,
  "to_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the target size category */,
  "size_label" TEXT /* Size label in the source category */,
  "mapped_size" TEXT /* Corresponding size in the target category */,
  "conversion_factor" TEXT /* Factor used for size conversion */,
  "conversion_description" TEXT /* Description of the conversion process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_mappings_from_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("from_category_id") REFERENCES size_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_mappings_to_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("to_category_id") REFERENCES size_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the product in inventory */,
  "size_range_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the size range related to the product */,
  "stock_level" INTEGER /* Stock level available for that size range */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse or store location */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last stock update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_size_range_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_range_id") REFERENCES size_ranges ("range_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the footwear product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the footwear */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender for which the product is designed (e.g., Men, Women, Unisex) */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group for which the product is designed (e.g., Adult, Kids) */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material used in the product */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the product image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, staff) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the record */,
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inventory record being accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access event */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., view, update) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_inventory_id FOREIGN KEY ("inventory_id") REFERENCES inventory ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size range related to the feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the feedback was created */,
  "resolution_status" TEXT /* Status of the feedback resolution (e.g., Open, Resolved) */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the staff member who resolved the feedback */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES size_ranges ("range_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, staff) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object detailing the permissions for the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
